# Automating Savings

```{r}
#| label: setup-r
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

```{python}
#| label: setup-py
#| include: false
```

<br>


The single most effective trick in personal finance: make saving the
[default]{style="color:#48a56a; font-weight: bold;"}, not a decision. If money leaves your checking account
automatically on payday, you'll adapt your spending to what's left.

  - Direct deposit splits
  - Automatic transfers and the "two-account" setup
  - Increasing contributions on a schedule
